$bat = @'
@echo off
chcp 65001 >nul 2>nul
title GBT小土豆全能开发者

cd /d "%USERPROFILE%\.gbt\vector_db" 2>nul
if not exist "launch.py" (
    echo [ERROR] GBT核心文件缺失: launch.py
    echo 请检查 %USERPROFILE%\.gbt\vector_db\ 目录
    pause
    exit /b 1
)

:: 查找 Python
set "PY="
for %%p in (python python3 py) do (
    where %%p >nul 2>nul
    if !errorlevel! equ 0 (
        set "PY=%%p"
        goto :found_python
    )
)

:: 常见Python路径
for %%d in (
    "C:\Python312" "C:\Python311" "C:\Python310"
    "%LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Python\Python312"
    "%LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Python\Python311"
    "%APPDATA%\Python\Python312"
) do (
    if exist "%%~d\python.exe" (
        set "PY=%%~d\python.exe"
        goto :found_python
    )
)

echo [ERROR] 未找到 Python，请安装 Python 3.10+
echo 下载: https://www.python.org/downloads/
pause
exit /b 1

:found_python
set "PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8"
echo [GBT] 正在启动...
"%PY%" launch.py %*
if %errorlevel% neq 0 (
    echo.
    echo [ERROR] GBT启动失败 (错误码: %errorlevel%)
    echo 请检查Python环境和依赖是否完整
    pause
    exit /b %errorlevel%
)
exit /b 0
'@

$utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("C:\Users\ADMIN\.gbt\GBT.bat", $bat, $utf8NoBom)
Write-Host "OK: GBT.bat rewritten"

$file = "C:\Users\ADMIN\.gbt\vector_db\splash.py"
$content = Get-Content $file -Raw -Encoding UTF8

# Add safe print function and fix the splash function
$safePrint = @'

def _safe_write(text):
    """安全输出，兼容Windows GBK终端"""
    try:
        sys.stdout.write(text)
    except UnicodeEncodeError:
        # 降级为ASCII
        safe = text.encode('ascii', errors='replace').decode('ascii')
        sys.stdout.write(safe)

'@

# Insert after the imports but before def splash
$content = $content -replace '(import sys, os, time, random\r?\n)', "`$1$safePrint"

# Replace sys.stdout.write with _safe_write in splash function
$content = $content -replace 'sys\.stdout\.write\(COLORS', '_safe_write(COLORS'
$content = $content -replace "sys\.stdout\.write\(COLORS", "_safe_write(COLORS"

# Also fix the final print
$content = $content -replace "print\(f\"\\\\n\{COLORS\['head'\]\}", "print(f\"\\n\{COLORS['head']\}"

$utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file, $content, $utf8NoBom)

# Verify it compiles
$path = "C:/Users/ADMIN/.gbt/vector_db/splash.py"
& python -c "compile(open('$path','r',encoding='utf-8').read(),'splash.py','exec')" 2>&1
if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host "OK: splash.py compiles" }

# Read the file as bytes, modify, write back
$enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8

# Add safe print function after the imports line
$importLine = 'import sys, os, time, random'
$safePrint = "`n`ndef _safe_write(text):`n    try:`n        sys.stdout.write(text)`n    except UnicodeEncodeError:`n        sys.stdout.write(text.encode('ascii', errors='replace').decode('ascii'))`n"

$content = $content.Replace($importLine, $importLine + $safePrint)

# Replace all sys.stdout.write with _safe_write
$content = $content.Replace('sys.stdout.write(COLORS', '_safe_write(COLORS')
$content = $content.Replace('sys.stdout.write(line + COLORS', '_safe_write(line + COLORS')
$content = $content.Replace('sys.stdout.write(COLORS.get', '_safe_write(COLORS.get')
$content = $content.Replace('sys.stdout.write(COLORS[', '_safe_write(COLORS[')

[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("C:\Users\ADMIN\.gbt\vector_db\splash.py", $content, $enc)
